name: Mexican Banana Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the softened cream cheese, brown sugar, rum, half and half, and cinnamon in a blender container.
2. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth (30 seconds).
3. Slice half of the bananas into an ungreased 1-quart casserole dish.
4. Dot with butter; spread with half of the cheese mixture.
5. Slice the remaining bananas into the casserole.
6. Spread with the remaining cheese mixture.
7. Bake uncovered at 325°F in an oven for 20-25 minutes until hot and bubbly.
